name: accountable-agent-runtime
description: Reference accountable-agent runtime (design-only): composes solid-agent-card + solid-a2a + solid-odrl (agent-delegation profile) + solid-vc + the agent-authz credential note into the Accountable Web of Agents vision paper's §4 worked scenario, made executable — a delegated agent acts and leaves a verifiable on-pod accountability trace; includes the composed four-phase chain verifier and the M1–M4 API gap list (G1–G15).
